title: BillingCustomer
description: Customers can be individuals or organizations that can subscribe to plans and have access to features.

name.description:
Display name of the resource.

Between 1 and 256 characters.

description.description:
Optional description of the resource.

Maximum 1024 characters.

created_at.description: An ISO-8601 timestamp representation of entity creation date.
created_at.title: RFC3339 Date-Time

updated_at.description: An ISO-8601 timestamp representation of entity last update date.
updated_at.title: RFC3339 Date-Time

deleted_at.description: An ISO-8601 timestamp representation of entity deletion date.
deleted_at.title: RFC3339 Date-Time

usage_attribution.description: Mapping to attribute metered usage to the customer by the event subject.

subject_keys.description:
The subjects that are attributed to the customer.
Can be empty when no usage event subjects are associated with the customer.
subject_keys.title: Subject Keys

usage_attribution.title: Usage Attribution

primary_email.description: The primary email address of the customer.
primary_email.title: Primary Email

currency.description:
Currency of the customer.
Used for billing, tax and invoicing.
currency.title: Currency

billing_address.description:
The billing address of the customer.
Used for tax and invoicing.
billing_address.title: Billing Address
